description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive striped pattern on its top surface, alternating between light beige and dark black bands. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern appearance. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel to the shorter edge of the block, creating a visually striking effect. The block appears to be solid and heavy, likely constructed from a dense stone or composite material. Its clean lines and uniform pattern suggest it is designed for urban environments, possibly as a decorative barrier or seating element. There are no visible signs of wear, engravings, or additional features beyond the striped surface.
description: A rectangular stone block with alternating beige and black stripes on top and solid black sides, giving it a modern, bold look.
description_view_0: The block is seen from the side with horizontal beige and black stripes dominating the top surface.
description_view_1: Viewed from the adjacent side, the stripes appear vertical, emphasizing the block's depth and the contrast between the light and dark bands.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side also shows the horizontal striped pattern, maintaining the same visual effect.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, with vertical stripes and a clear display of the block's solid black sides.
attribute_weathering_pattern: no visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
